preferred_name: minimum operating supply pressure for double acting actuator

preferred_name_ml.en: minimum operating supply pressure for double acting actuator
preferred_name_ml.de: minimaler Arbeitsdruck für einen doppeltwirkenden Antrieb

definition: lowest gauge pressure that can be applied to a double acting actuator, so that it still operates within its specified limits

definition_ml.en: lowest gauge pressure that can be applied to a double acting actuator, so that it still operates within its specified limits
definition_ml.de: niedrigster Überdruck, der zur Verfügung stehen muss, so dass ein doppeltwirkender Antrieb innerhalb seiner Spezifikationsgrenzen arbeitet
